observations.note: Red phase confirmed: 13/24 tests fail (AC1, AC2 partial, AC3 partial, AC4, AC5, AC6 partial). No false negatives.
AC#3 'no field extraction' and 'no context variable' tests pass pre-impl because ideate.md uses prose not code. Correct post-impl behavior.
Documentation stories require structural grep/wc tests rather than unit tests. Bash test script pattern well-suited for .md file validation.
AC#6 functional regression tests are structural-only. True functional regression (mode execution) cannot be tested via static analysis of .md files.
